description: 黑线 + 米白/白卡 + 克制柔彩高亮的结构化信息图。中等粗细黑色描边、实心黑发连帽衫小人、黑色数字圆圈分步、白卡描边、粗黑标题配黑下划线;代码窗口 mock、便签、文件夹、对勾、扁平小图标。柔彩只当高亮:桃=报错、绿=成功、黄=结论、紫=便签。比 illustrated-warm 更专业克制、信息密度更高。适合步骤讲解、工具/功能对比、概念拆解、调试/工作流复盘。

typography.heading: 粗黑体中文(思源黑体 Bold / 站酷酷黑),实心有力
typography.code: 等宽字体(JetBrains Mono),放进代码窗口 mock

prompt_template.newspic_card: Generate a clean flat editorial infographic card in Chinese, 3:4 portrait. Light warm off-white / cream background (#f6f4ef) with white rounded cards outlined in thin black. Confident, even, medium-weight BLACK ink line-art (smooth and clean, not sketchy); any cartoon people have SOLID BLACK hair, simple dot-eye faces and light hoodies. Mostly black + white/cream, with only a FEW MUTED PASTEL accent fills used sparingly as highlights: soft peach (#f4a261) for errors/warnings, soft green (#a8d3a6) for success/correct, soft yellow (#fbe7a2) for tips/conclusions, soft lavender (#d3c5ea) for notes — muted, never bright. At the top a bold BLACK sans-serif title '{card_main}' with a thin black underline divider and small decorative end marks. Below, present the point '{card_sub}' inside white rounded cards with thin black borders and clear bold black headings; use solid black numbered circle badges (1, 2, 3) for steps. Decorate with clean black-line props that fit the topic: a code-editor window mock (traffic-light dots, monospace code, a soft-green highlight on good lines, a soft-peach highlight and red squiggle on error lines, a small X badge), spiral notepad, folder, sticky note, checkmark badges, small flat line icons. Clean, structured, uncluttered. No photos, no 3D, no heavy gradients, no dark background.
prompt_template.article_inline: Generate a clean flat editorial infographic illustration in Chinese, 16:9 landscape. Topic: '{image_subject}'. Light warm off-white / cream background (#f6f4ef) with white rounded cards outlined in thin black. Confident, even, medium-weight BLACK ink line-art (smooth and clean, not sketchy); cartoon people have SOLID BLACK hair, simple dot-eye faces and light hoodies. Mostly black + white/cream, with only a FEW MUTED PASTEL accent fills used sparingly as highlights: soft peach (#f4a261) for errors/warnings, soft green (#a8d3a6) for success/correct, soft yellow (#fbe7a2) for tips/conclusions, soft lavender (#d3c5ea) for notes — muted, never bright. Bold BLACK sans-serif headings; solid black numbered circle badges for steps; white rounded cards with thin black borders. Decorate with clean black-line props fitting the topic (code-editor window mock with green/peach/red highlights and an X badge, notepad, folder, sticky note, checkmark badges, small flat line icons). Clean, structured, uncluttered. No photos, no 3D, no heavy gradients, no dark background.

example_reference: (黑线 + 米白 + 克制柔彩的步骤信息图:实心黑发连帽衫小人 + 数字圆圈 + 白卡 + 代码窗口 mock)
notes: 视觉指纹是'黑线小人 + 白卡 + 数字步骤 + 克制柔彩高亮'。比 illustrated-warm(暖橙渐变+气泡)更克制专业、信息密度更高,比 warm-handdrawn(粉黄手账)更冷静。适合讲流程/步骤/对比/调试。与 x-publisher skill 的 flat-editorial 同名同风格,跨 skill 复用。
